heading: Omitted
label: 590g–1, 590g–2 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 590g–1, acts , title I, ; , title I, , which related to allocations to the Soil Conservation Service for services of its technicians in formulating and carrying out the agricultural conservation program in the participating counties, was apparently restricted to the appropriation acts of which in each case it was a part.July 5, 1952, ch. 57466 Stat. 347July 28, 1953, ch. 25167 Stat. 216Section 590g–2, , , which related to allocations for State agricultural conservation programs to be utilized in determining the most needed conservation practices on individual farms, was apparently restricted to the appropriation act of which it was a part.act July 5, 1952, ch. 574, title I66 Stat. 347
